members.label: stairs
members.long_form_open_description: Three visible carpeted steps leading up to a small landing; beige/tan low-pile carpet on treads and risers with white baseboard trim along the side. Steps begin at the bottom-center of the image and ascend toward the back wall.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly below the staircase railing and to the left of the foreground couch
